Requires authentication. The template becomes immediately available for use in message campaigns.

data.summary_suggestion: Update an existing SMS template configuration

Returns the updated template object with modified fields and metadata. Requires authentication. Changes take effect immediately for any active campaigns using this template.

message: Operation 'deleteTimelySmsTemplate' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original description is too minimal and doesn't convey the destructive nature of the operation. Enhanced version clarifies the ID-based deletion, includes authentication, specifies the response type, and critically warns about permanent deletion and potential campaign impact to help AI agents make informed decisions.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete an SMS template by ID
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes an SMS template identified by ID. Requires authentication via tokenAuth. Returns success confirmation. Warning: Deleted templates cannot be recovered. If the template is currently in use by active campaigns, deletion may affect those campaigns. Verify template usage before deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and doesn't convey the destructive nature of the operation. Enhanced version clarifies the ID-based deletion, includes authentication, specifies the response type, and critically warns about permanent deletion and potential campaign impact to help AI agents make informed decisions.
